fields.event.name: Event Name
fields.event.name_hint: Displayed to attendees on the ticket page
fields.event.type_hint: Daily events require attendees to select a specific date when booking
fields.event.description_placeholder: A short description of the event
fields.event.description_hint: Shown on the ticket page. Max 256 characters.
fields.event.date_hint: When the event takes place. Times are in your configured timezone.
fields.event.location_hint: Where the event takes place. Shown on the ticket page.
fields.event.max_attendees_hint: For daily events, this limit applies per date
fields.event.max_quantity_hint: Maximum tickets a customer can buy in one transaction
fields.event.bookable_days_hint: Select which days of the week are available for booking
fields.event.min_days_notice_hint: How many days in advance attendees must book (0 = same day)
fields.event.max_days_ahead_hint: How far into the future attendees can book (0 = no limit)
fields.event.contact_fields_hint: Which contact details to collect from attendees
fields.event.allow_pay_more_hint: Let attendees pay more than the ticket price (the price above becomes a minimum)
fields.event.allow_pay_more_label: Allow attendees to set their own price
fields.event.max_price_hint: The maximum price attendees can pay. Must be at least {amount} more than the ticket price.
fields.event.registration_closes_hint: Leave blank for no deadline. Times are in your configured timezone.
fields.event.thank_you_url_hint: Leave blank to show a simple success message
fields.event.webhook_url_hint: Receives POST with attendee name, email, and phone on registration
fields.event.non_transferable_hint: Requires attendees to show ID matching the ticket name at entry
fields.event.hidden_hint: Hide from the public events page and search engines. The event is still bookable via its direct link.
fields.event.slug_hint: URL-friendly identifier (lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens). Changing this will break any existing links, embeds, or QR codes that point to this page. Only change if you know what you’re doing.
fields.event.image: Event Image (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP — max {size})
fields.stripe.secret_key_hint: Enter a new key to update
fields.square.location_id_hint: Your Square location ID (found in Square Dashboard under Locations)
fields.square.webhook_key_hint: The signature key from your Square webhook subscription
fields.email.test_subject: Test email from your ticket system
fields.email.test_body: This is a test email. Your email configuration is working correctly.
